title: Backend Developer Vacancy at PhonePe South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at PhonePe South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
PhonePe South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About PhonePe South Asia Partners:
PhonePe South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PhonePe South Asia Partners!
